title: post user register with valid data
description: Test the POST /user/register endpoint with valid name, email, and password to ensure it creates a new user, returns status 201, and provides a JWT token.

title: post user register with existing email
description: Test the POST /user/register endpoint with an email that already exists in the system to verify it returns a 409 conflict error indicating the user already exists.

title: post user login with valid credentials
description: Test the POST /user/login endpoint with valid email and password to confirm it authenticates the user, returns status 200, and provides a JWT token.

title: post user login with invalid credentials
description: Test the POST /user/login endpoint with invalid email or password to ensure it returns a 401 unauthorized error indicating invalid credentials.

title: post blog post with valid jwt and data
description: Test the POST /blog/post endpoint with a valid JWT token and valid form-data including title, content, and optional image upload to verify it creates a blog post and returns status 201.

title: post blog post without jwt token
description: Test the POST /blog/post endpoint without providing a JWT token to confirm it returns a 401 unauthorized error.

title: put blog post by author with valid data
description: Test the PUT /blog/post/{id} endpoint with a valid JWT token from the post author and updated form-data fields to ensure the blog post is updated and returns status 200.

title: put blog post by non author user
description: Test the PUT /blog/post/{id} endpoint with a valid JWT token from a user who is not the author to verify it returns a 403 forbidden error.

title: delete blog post by author or admin
description: Test the DELETE /blog/post/{id} endpoint with a valid JWT token from the post author or an admin user to confirm the blog post is deleted and returns status 200.

title: get api docs swagger ui page
description: Test the GET /api-docs endpoint to ensure it returns status 200 and serves the interactive Swagger UI page with documented API endpoints.
